title: ageratina cronquistii
intro: Ageratina cronquistii is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, and its leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ageratina cronquistii include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. Herbal preparations of Ageratina cronquistii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
